name: Cranberry-Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. In a large bowl, combine the flours, corn meal, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. In a small bowl or measuring cup, mix together the buttermilk, orange juice, oil, egg, and orange rind. Add the liquid mixture to the flour mixture, stirring until just moistened. Stir in the cranberries. Divide the batter among 12 greased muffin cups. Place the muffin tin in the hot oven and bake the muffins for 20-25 minutes.
